H14bBuluwB8.1: I went to teach seventh graders math in the New York City public schools.
H14bBuluwB8.2: And like any teacher, I made quizzes and tests, I gave out homework assignments.
H14bBuluwB8.3: When the work came back, I calculated grades.
H14bBuluwB8.4: What struck me was that IQ was not the only difference between my best and my worst students.
H14bBuluwB8.5: Some of my strongest performers did not have stratospheric IQ scores.
H14bBuluwB8.6: Some of my smartest kids weren't doing so well. And that got me thinking.
H14bBuluwB8.7: The kinds of things you need to learn in seventh grade math, sure, they're hard, ratios, decimals,
H14bBuluwB8.8: the area of a parallelogram, but these concepts are not impossible.

hAFuD-S-e_E.3: a big tear-jerking scene. If you want to date other people, say so. Be prepared for the
hAFuD-S-e_E.4: boy to feel hurt and rejected. Even if you've gone together for only a short time and haven't
